title: GMY G9 Halogen Oven Bulb 40W 230V 300℃ Heat Tolerant for Neff/AEG/Zanussi/Bosch/Oven Light Bulb 2 Pack
features: High quality: The g9 oven bulbs are made of high quality glass, instant on without any delay.
Easy to Install: With Standard G9 Base, the oven bulbs are easy to fit G9 light fittings and sockets.
Heat Resistant: Tolerant to 300 Degree C.
360° Beam Angle: With the full glass body, the oven light bulbs can shine with a 360° beam angle.
Wide Applications: The G9 OVEN BULBS fit for use in ovens and microwaves and other g9 base light fixtures.
description: From the brand Previous page About us We are convinced that light extends beyond its practical use: It is the invisible architect of your spaces, the accentuator of your happiest moments and the gentle glow that greets you on every return. It's not just about lighting up rooms, it's about creating atmosphere, refining your interior and setting the stage for the moments that count. Welcome to our shop! Next page
